post_text:
📌 FinOps for AI Systems

FinOps for AI Systems is less about theory and more about trade-offs in production. ⚙️

My current lens: AI cost optimization is a product architecture problem, not just a finance dashboard problem.. I optimize for clarity first, then scale, then cost. 🚀

The fastest way to improve outcomes is to choose the simplest design that still meets reliability goals. That keeps systems easier to debug, cheaper to run, and safer to evolve. 🧠

Route
Cache
Batch
Fallback
Govern

💬 If you had to simplify one part of your current architecture this week, what would you change first?

#SystemDesign #SoftwareArchitecture #Engineering #Scalability #TechLeadership
